series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Private Investigation Security Services Commission (OPISSC) Program Application
series_metadata.series_description: Contains original and renewal applications for the OPISSC Voluntary Accreditation Program, a compliance checklist, and a copy of an issued company accreditation certificate(s).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: current, four years following date of lapse, expiration, or termination of license. ; Electronic: current, four years following date of lapse, expiration, or termination of license
